summary: Full backend + frontend testing completed for Zaeem Afzal portfolio. All 10 backend pytest tests pass (root, status, contact CRUD, validation, persistence, ordering, _id leak check). Frontend Playwright run validates hero text, custom cursor (cursor-dot/cursor-ring), Lenis (window.__lenis), all 4 nav links + CTA, hero CTAs scroll, 6 project cards rendered, Vercel ecommerce live link present with target=_blank, 12 tech cards, contact form valid submission clears form & shows success toast, LinkedIn (x2) + GitHub (x2) links present in contact + footer. Resend in test mode returns email_sent=false for unverified recipient as expected; record still persisted and API returned 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form fields use HTML5 required, so the manual empty-field toast.error check in Contact.jsx onSubmit (lines 40-43) is unreachable in normal browser flow — browser-native validation blocks submission first. Not a defect, but the JS-side toast.error('Please fill name, email and message.') will essentially never fire. Consider removing required attribute if you want consistent toast UX, or remove the dead JS check.

Resend test mode quietly produces email_sent=false for non-verified recipients; the success toast wording 'Message received. I'll respond by email soon.' is appropriate. Owner should verify a domain in Resend before going live or owner mail will silently not deliver to non-verified addresses.
submit_contact stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but ContactResponse exposes it as datetime — current parsing in list_contacts handles both. OK.
No file size or DRY issues; all env vars correctly sourced from process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and os.environ; _id excluded from /api/contacts response.
seed_data_creation: Test rows inserted via /api/contact and /api/status with TEST_ prefix (not auto-cleaned, but harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints (root, status, contact CRUD + validation). Frontend has stable data-testids: hero-section, hero-name, hero-tagline, hero-cta-work, hero-cta-contact, nav-link-{work|about|stack|contact}, nav-cta-talk, project-card-{id}, project-live-{id}, project-github-{id}, tech-card-*, contact-form, contact-input-{name|email|subject|message}, contact-submit-button. Resend operates in test mode → email_sent=false for unverified addresses; this is by design and contact records still persist with HTTP 200.
